name: QA 1317
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1317

Muti-threading and __pmProcess*() family

valgrind variant, see qa/1316 for the non-valgrind variant



Copyright (c) 2021 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2604-container reproduce
descriptionHtml:
PCP QA Test No. 1317

Muti-threading and __pmProcess*() family

valgrind variant, see qa/1316 for the non-valgrind variant

Copyright (c) 2021 Ken McDonell. All Rights Reserved.

To reproduce this test, please run:

build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2604-container reproduce
statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 1317.out.bad)
8a9,30
> Thread 4:
> Conditional jump or move depends on uninitialised value(s)
> at 0x49D90AF: _IO_flush_all (genops.c:734)
> by 0x49D9676: _IO_cleanup (genops.c:883)
> by 0x49F29E1: __libc_freeres (set-freeres.c:135)
> by 0x484A14F: _vgnU_freeres (vg_preloaded.c:103)
> by 0x48E31BD: __pmProcessPipe (in /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpcp.so.4)
> by 0x4003986: func_C (multithread14.c:285)
> by 0x49DF0D9: start_thread (pthread_create.c:454)
> by 0x4A725B3: clone (clone.S:100)
> {
>    <insert_a_suppression_name_here>
>    Memcheck:Cond
>    fun:_IO_flush_all
>    fun:_IO_cleanup
>    fun:__libc_freeres
>    fun:_vgnU_freeres
>    fun:__pmProcessPipe
>    fun:func_C
>    fun:start_thread
>    fun:clone
> }
10a33,34
> Use --track-origins=yes to see where uninitialised values come from
> ERROR SUMMARY: 1 errors from 1 contexts ...
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
